case_title: RHODES, ROCKY vs. CALZADA, EMILIO et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, ROCKY AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, EMILIO CALZADA, CARMEN DOES 1 TO X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, ROCKY AS TO DEFENDANT CALZADA, CARMEN
